     1|## Instructions
     2|
     3|You are being asked to write internal company communication that doesn't fit into the standard formats (3P updates, newsletters, or FAQs).
     4|
     5|Before proceeding:
     6|
     7|1. Ask the user about their target audience
     8|2. Understand the communication's purpose
     9|3. Clarify the desired tone (formal, casual, urgent, informational)
    10|4. Confirm any specific formatting requirements
    11|
    12|Use these general principles:
    13|
    14|- Be clear and concise
    15|- Use active voice
    16|- Put the most important information first
    17|- Include relevant links and references
    18|- Match the company's communication style
    19|
